title: Sibling Relief (Disability)
text:
Sibling Relief (Disability) - SupportGoWhere
Sibling Relief (Disability)
Share link
Provides tax relief to individuals supporting their siblings and siblings-in-law with disability.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Claim up to $5,500 per dependant
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Relief of $5,500 granted to individual for each sibling or sibling-in-law supported.

Who is this for?

To claim Sibling Relief (Disability), all of the following conditions must be met:

Dependant must have disability^ or mental impairment^^

Dependant lived / has been living with you (on a permanent basis) in the same household in Singapore

If they live in a separate household, you must have incurred $2,000 or more in supporting them

No other type of relief has been claimed on the same dependant by someone else e.g. another family member

If multiple claimants are supporting the same sibling or sibling-in-law and claim the Handicapped Brother / Sister Relief for them, it will be shared among the claimants



^ Certified by a doctor to require assistance in any of the 6 Activities of Daily Living (Washing or Bathing, Dressing, Feeding, Toileting, Transferring, Mobility).



^^ Certified by a doctor to be impaired in any of these 3 areas: Self Care and Activities of Daily Living, Compliance to Psychiatric Treatment, Education or Work.

How to apply?

If you were previously approved for relief last year, the amount will be pre-filled and granted to you automatically. If you need to make changes to your relief, please refer to the below instructions for first-time applicants.




For e-Filing

If this is your first time claiming this relief:

Log in with your Singpass or Singpass Foreign user Account (SFA) at myTax Portal

Navigate to “Individuals” > “File Income Tax Return”

Select“File" to File Income Tax Return

Go to ““4. Deductions, Tax Reliefs and Rebates”

Select "Add New" > “Sibling”

Fill in the relevant information and select “Update”

Email IRAS through myTax Mail under myTaxPortal via Singpass login:

Completed Application for Claim of Disability Related Tax Reliefs

Letter / supporting documents from the disability association / Special Education school in respect of your sibling, indicating details of their disabilities




For paper filing

Complete the item on “Sibling Relief (Disability)” in Form B1 & B

If this is your first time claiming the relief:

Fill in the details of your sibling/sibling-in-law in Appendix 2

Email IRAS through myTax Mail under myTaxPortal via Singpass login:

Completed Application for Claim of Disability Related Tax Reliefs

Letter / supporting documents from the disability association / Special Education school in respect of your sibling, indicating details of their disabilities




If you were eligible for the relief but no longer qualify, please withdraw the claim from your Income Tax Return if the relief has been auto-included.

Where can I find help?

View more details

IRAS hotline: 1800-356-8300

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 23 Sep 2025
